ValidationRule.description: Compare the last payment date and insolvency date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(AND(ISNEW(),OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate ))), ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c)), ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,'PoC Details Provided'),(Last_Payment_Date__c >= Insolvency_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Insolvency date should be greater than last payment date
